Lyrics in Thanglish
Exact translation of tamil words

Poikkaal Kuthirai vazhkaiyada
pogum valiyo dhooramada
Irulum oliyum idaiyiniley
Sadukudu nadathidum neramada

Kalayil kan vizhikayil
indruenna varum yaarukum therivadhillai
Saalayil kan modhinaal
naam marupadi nadandhida marupadhilai

Kodutha nirangalai nirappa
Vazhkai ondrum kelviyillai
Iruttinil nadhigal nagardhaalum
Saththam adhai sollividum

sudalaimey ariyum velai
suthiram idhudhaan katruppaar
unnai vittu veliyaeri
unnai neeye uttruppaar

indha kaleidoscope kannaadi thundugalai
uruttuvadhu yaar, mirattuvadhu yaar
thurathuvadhu yaar, purattuvadhu yaar
Yaar yaar yaar yaar

Ivan paartha kaatchigal pizhaithaana
Illai thodarndhu thurathidum mazhaithaana (2)

Moochu vaangudhey moochu vaangudhey
vittu vittu vittu moochu vaangudhey
Kaatchi marudhey kaatchi maarudhey
Kannai katti vittu saatchi maarudhey

Ivan maaya theeyile vilundhaana
Ini kaayam indriye eluvaana

Moochu vaangudhey moochu vaangudhey
vittu vittu vittu moochu vaangudhey
Kaatchi marudhey kaatchi maarudhey
Kannai katti vittu saatchi maarudhey

Ivan paadhai engilum valithaana?
idhu thaedi vandhadhil vilai thaanai?

Moochu vaangudhey moochu vaangudhey
vittu vittu vittu moochu vaangudhey

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Poikkaal Kuthirai'?

The song conveys themes of life and the journey one undertakes, reflecting on the ups and downs.

What is the context of this song in the movie 'Samar'?

This song plays during a pivotal moment in the film, highlighting the protagonist's energetic spirit.

Who is the singer and music director of the song?

The song is sung and composed by Yuvan Shankar Raja.

When was 'Poikkaal Kuthirai' released?

The song was released on December 5, 2012.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Poikkaal Kuthirai, the vibrant energy of Yuvan Shankar Raja's music comes alive, perfectly complementing the film Samar. The song captures the essence of life's journey, filled with excitement and challenges. It evokes feelings of motivation and joy, making it a perfect anthem for celebrations and parties. The catchy beats and engaging lyrics resonate with listeners, leaving a lasting impression.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Poikkaal Kuthirai from Samar is an electrifying track that showcases Yuvan Shankar Raja's signature style. With vibrant beats and captivating lyrics by Na Muthukumar, this song is sure to get you moving. Experience the perfect blend of energy and melody that makes this track a standout in Tamil cinema.
stanzaMeanings: Life of a hollow horse is going far away, in the midst of darkness and light, it will lead us through the right path.
Today, no one knows who will come in the dream, we will not walk again after seeing the end in the dream.
The colors given will fill up, life has no questions. Even if rivers flow in the darkness, the sound will reveal it.
The work that is known will be clear, this is the lesson. If you leave, you will go outside, you will be the one to return.
Who is turning this kaleidoscope? Who is making it spin? Who is taking it out? Who is bringing it out? Who, who, who, who?
Are the sights he sees wrong? No, they continue and bring the rain.
Take the breath, take the breath, let go, let go, let go, take the breath. The sight changes, the sight changes, close your eyes and change the truth.
He fell into the fire of illusion, now there is no way to escape.
Take the breath, take the breath, let go, let go, let go, take the breath. The sight changes, the sight changes, close your eyes and change the truth.
Will he grow on any path? Is this the place that has come to find the price?
Take the breath, take the breath, let go, let go, let go, take the breath. The sight changes, the sight changes, close your eyes and change the truth.
